pin.description: The user's 5-digit transaction PIN (should be stored securely, e.g., hashed).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the profile was created.

accountNumber.description: The user's generated virtual account number.

bankName.description: The bank name for the virtual account.

avatar.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

nairaBalance.description: The user's main account balance in Naira.

clickCount.description: The user's click count for rewards.

hasReferral.description: Whether the user has used a referral code.

blockedUsers.description: An array of user UIDs that this user has blocked.

following.description: An array of user UIDs that this user is following.

followers.description: An array of user UIDs that follow this user.

isBanned.description: Whether the user's account is banned.

fwCardToken.description: Flutterwave card token for recurring payments.

isMarketplaceSubscribed.description: True if the user has paid the one-time marketplace subscription fee.

isOnline.description: Indicates if the user is currently online.

lastSeen.description: The last time the user was seen online.

SupportInfo.title: Support Information
SupportInfo.description: Stores contact and support information for the application.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who receives the notification.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who triggered the notification.

link.description: An optional link for the notification to navigate to.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction made by a user.

recipientName.description: Name of the recipient or service.

recipientDetails.description: Account number, phone number, or meter number.

sessionId.description: A unique ID for the transaction.

Chat.title: Chat Session
Chat.description: Represents a chat session between two or more users.

participants.description: Array of user UIDs participating in the chat.

lastMessage.description: The text of the last message sent.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat session.

chatId.description: The ID of the chat this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The UID of the message sender.

text.description: The text content of the message (optional if media is present).

mediaUrl.description: URL to the attached media file.

status.description: The delivery status of the message.

Post.title: Media Post
Post.description: Represents a media post created by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

text.description: The text content for text posts.

mediaUrl.description: URL of the uploaded media file from Cloudinary.

description.description: Caption or description for the post.

likes.description: Array of user UIDs who liked the post.

PostComment.title: Post Comment
PostComment.description: Represents a single comment on a media post.

postId.description: The ID of the post this comment belongs to.
